title: Coding answer payload
description: Submitted by the candidate for run-custom, run-tests, and submit actions. Matches the existing RunRequest shape in code_run_handlers.go.

language.description: Plugin slug of the language the candidate selected. Must be in the user's entitlement set.

entryFile.description: Path of the file to compile/run. Must exist in `files`. Falls back to LanguageConfig.defaultEntryFile when omitted.

customStdin.description: Used only by run-custom; ignored for run-tests/submit.
